task_completion.description: Create a Molten Salt Power Tower project in System Advisor Model (SAM).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the SAM application interface open with 'Molten Salt Power Tower' selected as the technology or visible in the project tree/tabs.

task_completion.description: Set the location and weather data to Phoenix, AZ.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Location and Resource' page in SAM showing a weather file for Phoenix, AZ selected.

task_completion.description: Configure and run the simulation for an Evaporative (Wet) cooling system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'System Design' or 'Power Cycle' page in SAM showing Evaporative/Wet cooling selected, followed by a simulation results screen showing annual energy and water use.

task_completion.description: Configure and run the simulation for an Air-cooled (Dry) cooling system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'System Design' or 'Power Cycle' page in SAM showing Air-cooled/Dry cooling selected, followed by a simulation results screen showing annual energy and water use.

task_completion.description: Create the output file cooling_comparison.json in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal showing the creation or saving of a file named 'cooling_comparison.json' in '/home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/'.

task_completion.description: Include all exactly required keys in the JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the contents of the JSON file and verify the presence of 'project_type', 'location', 'wet_cooling_annual_energy_kwh', 'wet_cooling_annual_water_use_m3', 'dry_cooling_annual_energy_kwh', 'dry_cooling_annual_water_use_m3', 'energy_penalty_percent', and 'water_savings_m3'.

task_completion.description: Calculate and record valid thermodynamic bounds and precise math for penalty/savings.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Examine the JSON values: verify wet energy > dry energy, wet water > 5x dry water, and that 'energy_penalty_percent' and 'water_savings_m3' are mathematically correct based on the raw wet and dry values provided in the file.

integrity.description: Agent used the System Advisor Model (SAM) GUI to run simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify the agent actually clicked through and interacted with the SAM application interface to generate the data, rather than just writing a script with guessed values.

integrity.description: JSON values match the actual SAM simulation outputs.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the raw energy and water use numbers typed into the JSON file correspond to the results displayed on the SAM summary/results screens.

integrity.description: Agent did not fabricate the JSON file without running simulations.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there is visual proof of both the wet and dry simulations completing in SAM before the JSON file is populated.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected filename: cooling_comparison.json. Expected location: Phoenix, AZ. Thermodynamic bounds for validation: wet cooling energy > dry cooling energy (> 10 GWh), and wet water use is > 5x dry water use. The calculated 'energy_penalty_percent' and 'water_savings_m3' must precisely match the mathematical difference/percentage based on the raw production values provided in the JSON.
